entity.summary: Turkish centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2013 that temporarily suspended crypto deposits and withdrawals in August 2025 after detecting unusual hot-wallet activity, while trading and Turkish-lira services continued.
entity.notes: BtcTurk remains active. The August 2025 incident materially affected crypto transfers but did not halt trading or Turkish-lira operations, and current official status pages continue to show operating services.

expected.summary: Turkish centralized cryptocurrency exchange that suspended crypto deposits and withdrawals in August 2025 after suspicious hot-wallet outflows reported around USD 48-49 million, while stating that fiat functions and trading continued and that user assets were safe.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The incident was a major negative CEX event but sources describe temporary crypto deposit/withdrawal suspension, continued trading/TRY operations, and user-asset safety statements rather than a terminal shutdown.

changes.summary: Turkish centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2013 that temporarily suspended crypto deposits and withdrawals in August 2025 after detecting unusual hot-wallet activity, while trading and Turkish-lira services continued.
changes.notes: BtcTurk remains active. The August 2025 incident materially affected crypto transfers but did not halt trading or Turkish-lira operations, and current official status pages continue to show operating services.

events.title: BtcTurk detected unusual hot-wallet activity
events.description: BtcTurk detected unusual movements in hot wallets and temporarily suspended cryptocurrency deposits and withdrawals as a precaution while trading and Turkish-lira transactions continued.
events.notes: Public estimates placed suspicious outflows near USD 48-49 million; the exchange did not initially confirm that full amount as a realized loss.

evidence.title: Crypto platform BtcTurk says all security measures taken after hacking claims
evidence.notes: Reports BtcTurk's official statement on unusual activity, temporary crypto transfer suspension, and uninterrupted trading and lira services.

evidence.title: BtcTurk experiences USD 48 million suspicious outflows
evidence.notes: Independent incident coverage quoting the exchange statement and blockchain-security estimate.

evidence.title: BtcTurk service status
evidence.notes: Official service-status page confirming continued platform operation.

evidence.title: BtcTurk official platform
evidence.notes: Current official domain confirming active exchange services.
